channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘Clearly stronger’: Germany’s Merz says Iran ‘humiliated’ US in its war
item.description: German chancellor warns the US risks becoming bogged down in another quagmire similar to Iraq and Afghanistan.

item.title: Have US-Iran talks failed? Why no deal yet doesn’t mean diplomacy is dead
item.description: US-Iran diplomacy in a deadlock, but analysts say both sides are unlikely to return to fighting.

item.title: Lebanon cannot be bombed into sovereignty
item.description: A sovereign Lebanon and a demilitarised Hezbollah cannot be achieved without a credible political transition.

item.title: Mbappe could miss El Clasico after Real Madrid confirm thigh injury
item.description: French striker doubtful after sustaining an injury to the semitendinosus muscle in his left leg, his club says.

item.title: Iran’s foreign minister in Russia for talks
item.description: Iran’s foreign minister in Russia for talks

item.title: Russia attacks Odesa, claims Ukraine hit Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant
item.description: Ukrainian attack on captured Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant kills one worker, according to managers installed by Russia.

item.title: North Korea opens museum commemorating troops killed fighting for Russia
item.description: Russia and North Korea deepen ties with plans for military cooperation and a symbolic memorial museum in Pyongyang.

item.title: The war on Iran is eroding nuclear non-proliferation
item.description: US-Israeli attacks on Iran under the pretext of ending a nuclear weapons programme are damaging confidence in the NPT.

item.title: Iran’s top diplomat visits Russia as part of efforts to end the war
item.description: Pakistan and Oman remain involved in backchannel efforts to prevent a return to open US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 59 amid diplomatic push to end conflict?
item.description: Iran discusses diplomatic solutions with regional partners as Trump says Iran could telephone if it wants to talk.
